meaning: n.拖网渔民 拖网渔船工人(或船员)
examples: A Chinese trawlerman for fishing in Japanese waters could help clarify two important messages.
Meanwhile, an ugly spat with Beijing over the arrest of a Chinese trawlerman for fishing in Japanese waters (see article) could help clarify two important messages.
The conviction of a trawlerman illegally fishing within Guernsey's 12-mile limit will act as a warning to others, according to the States.
